zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Württemberg於1343年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特時，她的父親Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II28歲，母親Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony19歲。她於1361年12月16日與John I Duke of Lorraine在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年7月26日在德國巴登-爾特波格享年26歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Württemberg于1343年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特时，她的父亲Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II28岁，母亲Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony19岁。她于1361年12月16日与John I Duke of Lorraine在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年7月26日在德国巴登-爾特波格享年26岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Württemberg was born in 1343, in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II, was 28 and her mother, Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony, was 19. She married John I Duke of Lorraine on 16 December 1361, in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 July 1369, in Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 26, and was buried in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Württemberg est née en 1343, à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John I Duke of Lorraine le 16 décembre 1361, à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1369, à Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Württemberg 1343 in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II 28 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony 19. Sie hat am 16. Dezember 1361 in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland John I Duke of Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1369 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Württemberg è nata il nel 1343 nel Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John I Duke of Lorraine il 16 dicembre 1361, nel Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1369, nel Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Württembergが1343年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートで生まれた時，父Conde Eberhard von Württemberg IIは28歳，母Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxonyは19歳であった。1361年12月16日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートでJohn I Duke of Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年7月26日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグで26歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Württemberg(이)가 1343년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1361년 12월 16일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에서 John I Duke of Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 7월 26일 독일 바데-wu르테버그에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Württemberg nasceu em 1343, em Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John I Duke of Lorraine em 16 de dezembro de 1361, em Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1369, em Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Württemberg родилась в 1343 г. в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John I Duke of Lorraine 16 декабря 1361 г. в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 июля 1369 г. в местности баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie von Württemberg nació en 1343, en Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John I Duke of Lorraine el 16 de diciembre de 1361, en Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1369, en Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
